steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks where the National Association of Black Journalists was founded. The answer must come directly from the passage.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Philadelphia: Philadelphia is not mentioned in the passage as the founding location. ✗
  • Choice B — Detroit: Detroit is not mentioned in the passage. ✗
  • Choice C — Washington, DC: the passage states the organization "was founded in Washington, DC, in 1975." ✓
  • Choice D — San Diego: San Diego is not mentioned in the passage. ✗
That matches Choice C — Washington, DC.
